name: brand_analytics_list_competitor_asins
description:
Lists the company's registered competitor ASINs from brand_analytics_iceberg.competitor_asins.

Use this tool to:
- See which ASINs the company tracks as competitors
- Filter by rivalry scope: against a specific ASIN, parent, or product family
- Audit `is_active` rows before running competitive analysis

Written by brand_analytics_write_competitor_asins. Consumed by brand_analytics_growth_machine_diagnosis (flags is_competitor, competitor_won_keyword) and optionally by brand_analytics_get_competitive_landscape.

company_ids.description: Company identifier(s) — required for multi-tenant isolation.

marketplaces.description: Optional: filter by Amazon marketplace code(s) (e.g., 'US').

against_my_asin.description: Optional: restrict to rivalries scoped against these of my ASINs.

against_my_product_family.description: Optional: restrict to rivalries scoped against these of my product families.

competitor_asins.description: Optional: filter to specific competitor ASIN(s).

include_inactive.description: If true, include soft-deleted rows (is_active = false).
